old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.37","title":"Improve SimRadio registration diagnostics","description":"connect_registered currently maps simulator MSG_ERR responses to generic RadioError::Protocol and uses OS-default connect timeout plus a fixed 100ms handshake read timeout. Introduce an error representation that preserves server code/message without compromising no_std RadioError users, and explicit configurable connect/registration timeouts.","acceptance_criteria":"Unknown simulation and duplicate-node errors retain server diagnostics; connection and registration timeouts are explicit and tested; malformed responses still report protocol errors; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T17:28:12.832133Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T17:28:12.832133Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.37","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T17:28:13.000563Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.37","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.27","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-17T17:28:13.123346Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
